message:
feat(web): add complete guide, enhance UI components, and improve command/flywheel libraries

New pages and components:
- apps/web/app/complete-guide/: new comprehensive guide page for the full
  ACFS stack overview with table of contents and deep-dive sections
- apps/web/components/complete-guide/: guide-specific UI components for
  the complete guide page layout

Flywheel visualization (flywheel-visualization.tsx):
- Export flywheelIconMap for reuse by other components
- Replace raw navigator.clipboard with copyTextToClipboard utility
- Add useRef-based timer cleanup to prevent memory leaks on unmount

Agent commands (AgentCardContent, AgentHeroCard, QuickAccessBar):
- Improve card content rendering and hero card presentation
- Enhance quick access bar with better command discovery

Command components:
- command-builder-panel.tsx: improve command builder UX
- command-card.tsx, command-ref-card.tsx: enhance card styling and content
- connection-check.tsx: improve connection status display

UI primitives:
- card.tsx: extend card variants
- code-block.tsx: improve code display and copy behavior
- stepper.tsx: refine step indicator styling

Libraries:
- commands.ts: add manifest-sourced command enrichment via
  mergeCommandWithManifest(), getManifestCommandByCliName(),
  getManifestCommandDocsUrl(); recategorize ntm from system to stack
- commandBuilder.ts: improve command building logic
- commandBuilder.test.ts: add test coverage for command builder
- flywheel.ts: update flywheel tool metadata
- manifest-adapter.ts: extend manifest data adaptation
- services.ts, userPreferences.ts: improve service and preference handling
- utils.ts: add copyTextToClipboard() cross-browser clipboard utility
- globals.css: styling updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
